title: Minister Pu Lalthansanga Champhaia Inter Village Football Tournament khar
content:
288/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 24th April 2026 :EF&CC Minister Pu Lalthansanga chuan nizan (23rd April 2026) khan Rev. H. Chinzapaua Memorial Inter Village Football Tournament chu a khar.

Khuallian Pu Lalthansanga chuan Infiammite tana pawimawh ber chu mahni inthunun theihna a nih thu a sawi a, Rev. H. Chinzapauva Memorial Inter Village Tournament hi Mizoram District dangte entawn tlak khawpa discipline awmna tha a nih thu a tarlang.

Infiammite chu rual u zawk ten an tawn hriat tawh atanga thu tha an sawi leh an hrilh thin te chu zawm tum zel a that thu a sawi a, mi hlawhtlingte hlawhtlin chhan zirchiang a, an hlawhtlinna phena an thawhrimna hmuh thiam a tul thu leh chu thawhrimna chuan vanneihna a ken tel thin thu a sawi a, chu chuan mi hlawhtling ni thei turin kawng a sut kuak sak thin, a ti a, infiammite chu mi hlawhtling tia sawi an nih ve ngei theihna tura thawhrimna kalsan ngai lo turin a fuih nghal bawk.

Khuallian chuan infiamna kawngah tha thawkhat tawh viau mah ila, referee lamah pawh tan lak a tul thu a sawi a, chumi atan chuan he tournament hi hmang tangkai ngei turin infiammite duhsakna a hlan a, final khel tur te pawh duhsakna a hlan bawk.

Khuallian hian thu a sawi zawhah Final khel turte chibai a buk a, Rev. H. Chinzapaua Memorial Inter Village Football Tournament chu khelh nghal a ni. Final-ah hian Bethel VC leh Melbuk VC team te an inkhel a, Melbuk VC Team ten hnehna an chang a ni.

Attachment

title: MLA ER. H. GINZALALA'N ART OF LIVING INTERNATIONAL CENTER, BENGALURU A TLAWH
content:
282/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 24th April:Nimin Ningani (23rd April 2026) khan Champhai North bialtu MLA Er. H. Ginzalala chuan the Art of Living International Center, Bengaluru a tlawh, Skills Development leh youth empowerment chungchangah mithiam te nen in kawmna hun an nei bawk.

He hunah hian the Art of Living International official leh representative-te nen an inkawmna hun tha tak neiin skills development & entrepreneurship chungchang te sawi hoin thiamna inhlan chhawn kawngah te, thalaite eizawnna leh an thiamna tih hmasawn kawngah te hmasawnna tur thil pawimawh tak tak sawi ho a ni.

He programme hi Mizo te'n Skills lamah theihna sang tak mai kan neih te chhawr tangkai thei tura hmalakna niin Mizorama Skills development programme lam tih hlawhtlin theih dan leh thawh hona tur kawng te zawn a ni a, a bik takin thalai ten an thiamna leh theihna chhawr tangkai tura hmalakna pawimawh tak a nih thu tarlan a ni.

Attachment

title: MLA ER. H. GINZALALA CHUAN IIHR BENGALURU A TLAWH
content:
281/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 24th April 2026: Nilaini (22nd April 2026) khan Champhai North Bialtu MLA Er. H. Ginzalala chuan Indian Institute of Horticultural Research (IIHR), Bengaluru a tlawh a, horticulture lam hmasawnna leh thawh ho theihna chungchangte sawi ho a ni.

He hunah hian, Senior Scientist leh Official-te nen inkawmin Senior Scientist te chuan crop improvement, sustainable farming practice leh horticulture technology thar hmanga an thawh dan an hrilhfiah a. Climate-resilient crops, organic farming leh high-value horticultural produce lam hmasawn theih dan te sawi ho a ni bawk.

MLA Er. H. Ginzalala chuan Mizoramin horticulture sector a hma kan sawn theihna tur te, kuthnathawktuten tun aia awmze nei zawk leh sustainable agricultural lama hma kan sawn theihna tur a theihtawp chhuah a tul thu a sawi a. IIHR-in innovation lama an hnathawh te fakin Mizoram sawrkar leh IIHR inkara thawh hona tih chak te, thiamna tam tak inhlan chhawn a, kan ramah ngei Scientist te lo kala training programme leh technology transfer lamah tha taka thawhpuiah a sawm bawk.

IIHR official-te chuan Mizoram atanga sawrkar lam hotuten an rawn tlawh thei chu an lawm thu leh partnership thar siam a horticulture hmasawnna turah theihtawp chhuahpui an in huam thu an sawi bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: HEALTH MINISTER - PI LALRINPUII'N PGIMER, CHANDIGARH A TLAWH
content:
279/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 24th April, 2026 :Vawiin ni khan Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER), Chandigarh a tlawh a. Mizorama Medical College - ZMCH-ah zirna quality a lo that chhoh zel theihna turin PGIMER nena Teachers Exchange programme chungchang te, Students Exchange Programme neih theih dan tur kawng te a sawi pui a ni.

Minister hi Dr Vivek Lal, Director, PGIMER in a lo dawngsawng a, ZMCH nena thawhho theih dan kawng awm thei ngei se a duh thu a lo hrilh a ni.  A rang thei ang bera thawhhona a awm theihna turin inremna thuthlung te pawh ziah ran a duhthu a lo sawi a.  MD course ah sponsored seat an neih thu sawiin, PGIMER Director chhan Mizoram doctor te zingah entrance exam paltlang thei awm tam se a duh thu a lo sawi a ni.

Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan PGIMER hotute hnenah hian ZMCH a hawn thar tur Lung lam zaina - Cardio Thorasic chungchanga thawktu ten practical training an neih chhoh zel dan tur kawng a sawi pui bawk.

Minister hi Pi Lalzarmawii, IAS, Commissioner & Secretary leh Pu H. Lalhruaitluanga, Under Secretary & PS to Minister ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: HNAHTHIAL SP THUCHHUAK : ROAD BLOCK CHUNGCHANG
content:
278/2026-2027

Hnahthial SP Thuchhuak : Road Block chungchang

Dated Hnahthial the 24th April, 2026 :Hnahthial atanga Denlung panna Approach road, Pu V.L Zuidika In, Electric veng atanga Hnahthial By-Pass Junction, Denlung Peng; Electric Veng, Hnahthial chu siam mek a ni a. Kawng siam hna hi chak zawk leh tha zawk a thawh a nih theih nan SDO, PWD, Hnahthial Sub Division-I chuan ziak in SP, Hnahtthial hnenah Road Block a dil belh a. Helai kawng pawimawh tak hi tlo leh tha tak a siam a nih theih nan Govt. of Mizoram Notification No.12021/10/2004/TRF, Dt.27.05.2020 in MV Act Sec 115 &117 hmanga lirthei tlandan tur khuahkhirhna siam thei tura thuneihna a pek angin, Dt.26.04.2026 (Sunday) atanga Dt.30.04.2026 (Thursday) thlengin helai kawngah hian lirthei eng chi mah tlan phal loh (Road Block) a nih thu Hnahthial SP chuan a chhuah.

He thupek hian khuarel chhiatna, kangmei leh emergency kaihhnawiha duty, dan leh thupek pawimawh bika Police leh Magistrate duty te chetvelna a huam lovang.

title: Lungleia War Memorial chei ṭhat thar chu hawn a ni
content:
277/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 24 :Lunglei khawpui laili taka awm, indonaa sipai martarte hriat rengna lungphun, War Memorial chei ṭhat thar chu vawiin khan Assam Regiment 3 Corps General Officer Commanding (GOC) Lt Gen. Abhijit S. Pendharkar, UYSM, AVSM, YSM chuan ralkhat aṭangin biakhmuhtheihna (video conferencing) kal tlangin a hawng.

War Memorial hawnnaah hian 3 Corps GOC ai awhin 23 Sector Assam Rifles Commander, Deputy Inspector General Brig. Puspendar Sorayan chuan a hmunah War Memorial khuhna puanzar pawt hawngin, Corps Commander ai awhin ram tana nun hlantu sipai huaisen martarte zahna leh hriat rengna pangpar kual a dah nghal a. War Memorial Lungleia hming chuang sipai huaisen martarte hriat reng nan leh anmahni zahna lantir nan hian Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga, District Sainik Welfare & Resettlement Officer Maj. Rebecca L. Chhakchhuak (Retd), Mizoram Ex-Services League (MESL) hruaitute leh martar chhungte'n pangpar an dah bawk.

Sipai martarte puala pangpar dah a nih hnu hian anmahni hriat reng nan leh sun nan minit hnih chhung ngawi renga din a ni a. Sipai tih dana tawtawrawt ham leh silai nena chibai bukna hun hman a ni bawk.

Assam Regiment 3 Corps Commander Lt Gen. Abhijit S. Pendharkar chuan Lungleia War Memorial chu ram tana nun hlantu sipai huaisente chawimawina leh an inpekna hriat rengna atana din a nih thu sawiin, mi ṭhahnem ngaite inpekna avanga chei ṭhat a nih hnua hawn theih a ni leh ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. War Memorial-a hming chuang martarte chu khua leh tuite himna leh ralmuanna atana nun hlantu; sipai ni satliah ngawt lo va, thawnthu tam tak hnutchhiahtu; Mizo tlawmngaihna laimu—mi dangte tana inpekna—a taka nun chhuahpuitu an nih thu sawiin, an inpekna chu zah taka hriat reng a nih tur thu a sawi a. Martar chhungte chu an hmangaih kal tate inpekna chu a thlawn lo tih hria a, anmahni hriat rengna chhuang taka vawng nung zel tura chahin, an sulhnu chu suanglungah ni lovin, thinlungah a inker tih hre reng turin a chah a. Sipai ṭang laite pawh martarte inpekna chu hun liam tawha mi anga ngai lo va, ram tana an tih theih sang ber hriat thartirtua hmang tura chahin, hriat rengna lungphun chu ram mipuite'n ram tana inpekna hlutzia hriat tharna atan te, hriat rengna chauh chuan amahin remna a vawng thei lo va, inpumkhatna leh inpekna nen mipuite'n remna leh muanna chu vawn him tur a ni tih hriat thartirtu atan te hmang se a duh thu a sawi.

23 Sector Assam Rifles Commander Brig. Puspendar Sorayan chuan ram tana nun hlantu sipaite leh ram tana theih tawp chhuaha thawktu sipaite chuan ngaihhlut leh chawimawi an phu hle tih sawiin, sipaite chu ram mipuite tana thawk an nih thu a sawi a. Assam Rifles chuan Mizoram mipuite nen thawh hona ṭha tak an vawng tih sawiin, ramri ven himna bakah, mipuite'n khawtlang nun leh ei leh bara hma an sawnna turin kawng hrang hranga hma an lak thu te, hriselna, zirna leh inzirtirna kawngah a ṭul anga ṭanpuina leh kaihhruaina an pek ṭhin thu te, ṭhalaite ruihhlo laka an him theih nan ruihhlo tawlh ruk ven kawngah nasa taka hma an lak thu leh ruihhlo ṭhahnem tak an man ṭhin thu te a sawi a. Mizoram hmasawnna kawng hrang hrangah a theihna apiangah sawrkar leh mipuite thawhpui an inhuam thu a sawi.

LMC Vice Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma chuan Lunglei khaw chhunga War Memorial awm chu Lunglei mipuite leh LMC-in an ngaih hlut thu leh LMC sawrkar a din hnuah a chei ṭhat dan tur te pawh ngaihtuah ṭhin a nih thu sawiin, chei ṭhat a nih theih nana Lunglei DSW&RO leh thawktute ṭhahnem ngaihna fakawm a tih thu leh 3 Corps Assam Rifles GOC ruahmannaa chei ṭhat a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. War Memorial chu martarte zahna leh hriat rengna vawng nungtu leh Lunglei khawpui chei mawi a, tiropuitu a nih zel a beisei thu a sawi.

Lunglei DSW&RO Maj. Rebecca L. Chhakchhuak chuan War Memorial hmun chu Mizoram sawrkarin kum 1977-a a pek a nih thu leh Indopui Pahnihnaa 1st Assam Regiment sipai martar mi 103 te hming leh Independence hnua Lunglei District aṭanga Assam Regiment sipai martar mi 5 te hming chuanna lungphun pahnih a awm ṭhin thu sawiin, tunah 3 Corps Commander hma laknaa chei ṭhat niin, lungphun pakhata dah a nih thu a sawi a. War Memorial chei ṭhatna kawnga tha thawhtu zawng zawng chungah leh martar chhungte chungah te, War Memorial hawnnaa telte chungah te lawm thu sawiin, chu hmun chhuanawm leh ropui tak chu humhalh a, chawi vul zel turin Lunglei mipuite a chah.

War Memorial Lunglei hi Lunglei khawpui laili, Chanmari veng chhunga awm a ni a. Indopui Pahnihnaa ram tana nun hlantu sipai martar mi 103 te leh hel beihnaa martar mi 5 te hming chuanna leh anmahni hriat rengna lungphun awmin, Lunglei DSW&RO office-in an enkawl a ni.

Attachment

title: LIRTHEI 10MT AIA RIT TAN TUIVAI LEI ZAWH KHAP
content:
Lirthei 10mt aia rit tanTuivai Lei zawh khap

276/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 24th April, 2026 :PWDSr. Executive Engineerchuan mipuite him zawk nanUnity Bridge (R. Tuivai Lei) hi lirthei 10mt (Metric ton) aia rit tan zawh a khap.

Unity Bailey Bridge (Temporary bridge), Tuivai lui kantu, Manipur leh Mizoram inkalpawhna Lei pawimawh tak  NH-150 chhunga mi hi, hawn a nih atangin a Lei chunglama Motor lian khuahkhirhna tur thir khamphei (Horizontal bar) siam a nih hma atangin, Motor lian Balu huh (wet sand) phur ten an zawh nasa hle tih hriat a ni a. August 2025 thla atanga April 2026 thleng thla tin Lei enfiah a ni a, Lateral Sway hian GRSE Manual Clause B. 4: "Chapter of Inspection, Testing, Preservation, Maintenance"-in  lei inthen (sway) khuahkhirhna (restriction) a siam a pel tih hmuhchhuah a ni.

Uluk taka Lei enfiahna record zawng zawngt thlir ho a nih hnuin, April ni 17, 2026 a Engineer-in-Chief, PWD ho a meeting chuan Lei (Bridge) paltlang motor tlan thei rih zawng chu 10MT ah tih hniam ni se tiin a rel a. Hei hi Lei daih rei nan leh Lei hmangtute him zawk nan a tih a ni.

PWDSr. Executive Engineerchuan Gazette of India Extraordinary dated 16th September, 2019 S.O. 3293(E) sl no. 2 hmangin Control of National Highways (Land and Traffic) Act, 2002, Section 33, 36 & 43 leh MoRTH aiawh in Section 35 tlawhchhanin, Unity Bridge (R. Tuivai Lei) chu lirthei eng chi mah 10mt (Metric ton) aia rit tan zawh khapna thupek chu April 23, 2026 khan a tichhuak a. He thuphek hian chhuah  nih atanga thla khat (one month) chhung a huam ang.

title: BUNGTLANG SOUTH- AH RUALBANLOTE TAN HEALTH CAMP NEIH A NI.
content:
275/2026-2027Lawngtlai, 24th April 2026 :Nimin khan Social Welfare Department bultumin Primary Health Centre, Bungtlang South-ah Rualbanlote tan (PWDs) ' Health Camp' neih a ni.

Pu Lalthanzuala, BDO Bungtlang South chuan khaw hrang hrang atanga hriselna ngaipawimawh a, Health Camp- chhim tura lo kal zawng zawngte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei a. Sum tam tak seng a, Health Camp- buatsaihtu Social Welfare Department leh Health Department - te inpekna avanga Health Camp- neih theih a nih thu tarlangin, hma lak hunah pawh thahnem ngai taka thawk zel turin a fuih a.

Health Camp - hlawhtling takal neih a nih theih nan a zau thei ang bera mipuite hnenah hriattirna tichhuah a nih thu sawiin, VC leh khawtlang mipuite thawhpuinaah lawmthu a sawi bawk.

Health Camp- ah hian khaw- 34 atangin mi- 184 an inentir thei a, heng zinga mi- 124 te chu Rualbanlo (PwD's) a finfiah niin, heng finfiahte hnenah hian PwD Certificate - hlan nghal an ni.

Health Camp- neihnaah hian, Dr. Zoremmawii, Ophthalmology, Dr. Jacob Laldinpuia, Orthopedic, Dr. Malsawmtluangi, Psychiatrist, Lalrinzuali Ralte , Audiologist / AA, Lalfakawmi Khiangte, Optometrist /OA, Dr. Lalawmpuia, Clinical Psychology, ten an telpui thei a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL MONITORING CELL COMMITTEE ON LPG & POL THUKHAWM
content:
274/2026-2027

Lawngtlai , the 24th April, 2025 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 11:00 PM khan District Level Monitoring Cell Committee, Lawngtlai District chu Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaina hnuai ah DC Office Chamber, Lawngtlai ah an thukhawm.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga  chuan member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi. Bawrhsap chuan LPG leh POL hi tun dinhmunah chuan Central leh State Advisory a kal mek kan ni a. Tun din hmun ah report a lan danah Lawngtlai District ah POL bik ah hman sen loh kan nei a, LPG ah pawh harsatna lian tham lutuk a awm lo a ni a ti. Chuti chung chuan vawiin ni a kan ngaihtuah ngai ber chu mipuiin harsatna kan tawk em tih hi a ni a ti.

Thutkhawm ah hian Pu Lianchhuma Chinzah, Member Secretary & DCSO, Lawngtlai District chuan tun dinhmun ah Petrol & Diesel ah litres nuai khat chuang Lawngtlai District ah stock a awm reng a ni a ti a. LPG bikah hian tunlai in DAC thleng thei lo hian mipui leh Agency lamah harsatna a siam deuh a, LPG Stock erawh a awm tha tih thu a sawi. Thutkhawm na ah hian LPG bika DAC lama harsatna awmte Bawrhsap in thuneitute lamah lehkha leh tawngka a biak a nih tur thu ngaihthlak a ni.

Thutkhawm ah hian SDC - I&II, Inspector, Legal Metrology Department, President, DCPA, Manager, M/S Khuma Gas Agency leh AMPEDA Sub-Hqr aiawh an tel a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: RD&AD MINISTER-IN NATIONAL PANCHAYATI RAJ DAY 2026 LAWMNA HUN A HMANPUI
content:
272/2026-2027Aizawl dated 24th April 2026 :Prof. Lalnilawma, Minister, Rural Development & Administration Department chuan ‘Sashakt Panchayat, Sarvangeen Vikas’ – Empowered Panchayats, Holistic Development’ tih thupui hmanga Directorate of Local Administration bultuma, DRDO Aizawl Conference Hall-a National Panchayati Raj Day lawmna hun chu khuallian niin a hmanpui a. Pu Lalchawimawia, Joint Director, Directorate of Local Administration chuan hun kaihruaiin , Dr. Lalngura Tlau, Director chuan National Panchayati Raj Day chunchang sawi hawnna hun a hmang a. Pu ST Lalhmingmawia, Joint Director chuan lawmthu sawina hun a hmang bawk a ni.

National Panchayati Raj Day 2026 lawmnaa khuallian RD & AD Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan, ram tih hmasawnna tura pawimawh ber chu khawtlang tih hmasawnna a nih thu tarlangin, chumi atana mawhphurhna pawimawh tak chu, khawtlang inrelbawlna kaihruai tura thlanchhuah – Village Council member-te kutah a awm thu a sawi a. Kum 2047-a India ram hi ram hmasawn leh ropui,’Vikshit Bharat’ a siam a nih theih nan Village Council hi hmanraw tangkai tak an nih mek thu a sawi bawk a ni.

RD&AD Minister chuan Village Council kaltlanga khawtlang tih hmasawnna hna thawh kawngah, inelna thianghlim neih thin a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Khawtlang mipui aiawh tura thlan tlin kan nih angin, a tul hunah chuan kan mimal ngaihdan leh awn lam neihte dah boin, khawtlang thatna tur dah pawimawh hmasak ber thin a tul thu a sawi a. A hun taka tanrual leh thawhhona boruak siam thiam khawtlang hruaitu awmna apiangah hmasawnna a kal chak thin thu a sawi.

Khawtlang tana rotling, tangkaipui ngei ngei tur chauh ruahmanna siam thin tur a nih thu Minister chuan sawiin, a hun taka hna thawh zawh a pawimawh rualin, a nih dan tur taka thawh a ni em, tih ngaih pawimawh tel tur a nih thu a sawi a. Khawtlanga mi harsate dawm kanna tur scheme kalpuina kawngah pawh a dawng tur dik tak ten an dawn ngei theih nan Village Council chu a pawimawh hle thu a sawi.

Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Village Council Act thar tlangzarh a nih thu tarlangin, he dan bu chhungah hian Village Council-ten thu an neihna chi hrang 21 lai tarlan a nih thu leh an mawhphurhna pawimawh tak tak pawh ziah lan a nih thu a sawi a. Village Council member-te lawmman ennawn a nih theih nan hmalakna a kal mek thu sawiin, 15th Finance Commission hnuaia 2021-22 Grant la bangte, 2022-23, 2023-24 leh 2024-25 Grant-te hmuh tawh a nih thu a tarlang a. 16th Finance Commission-ah chuan Own source of Revenue (ORS), Village Council, mahni inenkawl thei tura ruahmanna siam thiamte chu ngaih pawimawh an nih tur thu a sawi.

RD&AD Minister chuan inrelbawlna felfai, langtlang leh hmasawnna thlen zung zungna khawtlang siam tur chuan, engkima Sawrkar rinchhan tlat tum Village Council nih loh a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Mahni kea din tum, mahnia intodelh tum tlat Village Council chuan khawtlangah hmasawnna a thlen chak zawk thu sawiin, Village Council tha tichak turin Sawrkar chu a inpeih reng thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Dr. Lalngura Tlau, Director chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin; rampum huapa inelna hrang hrang zing ah Kawrthar N chuan theme 5-na ” Clean and Green Award” lawmman an dawn avangin lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Hmalakna hlawhtling hi Village level-ah nasa takin a innghah thu a sawi bawk. Mizoram pum ah Village council 830 a awm a, chung zing a 286 chu autonomous district area huamchhung a mi an nia, Village council te thawmthat nan village council tin ah Computer set sem chhuah mek a nih thu Dr. Lalngura Tlau hian a sawi.

National Panchayati Raj Day pual hian Village council 12 te hnen ah Computer set a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

He hun ah hian Rural Development & Administration a thawktute, I&PR ,SRRD, DRDO, Aizawl, Mizoram Village Council Association hruaitute leh Village Council thlanchhuah 12 te an tel bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: LUNG ENKAWLNA HAWNG TURIN ZMC&H INBUATSAIH; TRAINING TURIN PGIMER AH MI 5 KAL
content:
271/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 24th April, 2026 :Zoram Medical College & Hospital-a Lung lam enkawlna - Cardiothoracic and Vascular Surgery (CTVS) Operation Theatre (OT), Intensive Care Unit (ICU) leh Cath Lab-te hawng tura hmalakna kal zelah training turin Doctor 1 leh Nursing Officer 4 te chuan April ni 13, 2026 khan PGIMER, Chandigarh an pan.

ZMC & H atanga kal te hi:

1. Advanced Cardiac Centre a CTVS OT-ah :  Anaethetist-1, Nursing Officer -2

2. CTVS ICU, CCU leh Cath Lab-ah :  Nursing Officer-2 -te an ni.

Ni sawmthum (30) chhung training an nei ang a. Anni bakah hian ZMC&H-a Nursing Superintendent pahnih (2)-te chuan department hrang hrang kalphung zirchiang turinn kar hnih (2) chhung hun an hmang bawk a ni.

PGIMER hi India rama medical lam Zirna In pawimawh leh hlun tak a ni a. “Institute of National Importance” tia hriat hlawh te zinga mi a niin khum pawh 2233 lai a awm a ni.

title: TRAIN CARRIAGE BOOKING SYSTEM LEH UNNATI SCHEME CHUNGCHANG WORKSHOP NEIH A NI
content:
270/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 24th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Commerce,Industries, Geology and Mining Department leh Raising and Accelerating MSME Performance (RAMP) te ṭangkawp chuan  I&PR Conference Hall, Lianchhiari Rûn ah Train Carriage Booking System leh UNNATI Scheme chungchang workshop an buatsaih a. He hun hi Dr. H Lianzela, Secretary, Commerce, Industries, Geology and Mining Department chuan kaihruaiin, workshop hi hun hniha ṭhen a ni.

Workshop-ah hian chawhma lamah UNNATI scheme chungchanga hriattur pawimawhte inzirtirna hun hman a ni a. Pu Zorema Darkim, Project Implementing Unit (UNNATI) chuan presentation hmanga kalkhawmte zirtirna pein, UNNATI Scheme nihphung leh a dildan kal hmangte a sawi zau a. Kalkhawmte nen zawhna leh chhanna hun hman nghal a ni.

Hun hnihna chawhnu lamah hian North East Frontier Railways leh Pu Lalhmunsiama, Additional Director, Directorate of Commerce and Industries te’n hun an hmanga. North East Frontier Railways-te hian rel (train) hmanga bungraw lakluh leh thawnchhuahdan chungchangah zirtirna an pe a. Pu Lalhmunsiama, Additional Director, Directorate of Commerce and Industries chuan Trade Receivables Discounting System (TReDS) leh LEAN (MSME Competitive) scheme chungchang presentation hmangin zirtirna a pe bawk a ni.

Vawiina workshop-ah hian sorkar department hrang hrang bakah industries association-te leh entrepreneurs ṭhahnem tak telin, UNNATI scheme huapzau zawka kalpuina atana hmalakdan turte an sawi ho nghala. Pu Rinawma, Joint Director (Admin), Directorate of Commerce & Industries chuan lawmthu sawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: TOURISM CONCLAVE NEIH TUR CHUNGCHANGAH MINISTER PU LALNGHINGLOVA HMAR LEH NITI AAYOG OFFICIAL-TE NEW DELHI-AH INKAWM
content:
269/2026-2027

New Delhi, the 24th of April, 2026:Mizorama October thlaa Tourism Conclave neih tur leh, chumi inbuatsaihna’n a New Delhi-a Pre-Conclave meeting neih tur chungchangah vawiin chawhma khan Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar leh NITI Aayog officer te chu Chanakyapuri, New Delhi-a Mizoram House ah an inkawm a, Conclave hlawhtling leh Mizoramin a hlawkpui ngei tur buatsaih tura hmalak ho dan tur an sawiho. NITI Aayog officer te hi Pi Swapnalee Bhattacharya,ISS, Dy. Director General in a ho a ni.

Mizoram Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Sairang thleng rel a luh hnuah Mizoram tlawhtu an pung nasa tih a sawi a. “Sairang thleng rel a luh hnuah Mizoram tlawhtu chu chawhrualin thlakhatah nuai khat an chuang tawh a, thlawhtheihna leh rela inkalpawhna a awlsam tawh avangin an pun zel kan ring. India rama thlasik khawpui (Winter Capital of India) ni thei turin hma kan la mek a, Mizoram tlawhtute rei zawk an châm theihna’n an tlawh tur leh tihtur tam zawk buatsaih kawngah hmalakna a kal mek a ni,” a ti.

Vawiina meeting-ah hian ‘pre-conclave meeting’ chu May, 2026 ah Vigyan Bhawan, New Delhi-ah neih nise tiin rel a ni a. NITI Aayog leh Mizoram sawrkar thawhho dan tur leh, meeting neih tur kaihhnawiha mawhphurhna hrang hrang insem dan turte sawiho a ni.

Pre-conclave ah hian Mizoram hmasawnna tur uluk taka ngaihtuahin, India rama Tourism kaihhnawih industry langsar leh stakeholder dangte nen ‘brainstorming’ neih a ni ang a, chuta tanga hmalakna tur lo langte chu October-a Mizoram Tourism Conclave neih hunah a taka kalpui turin ruahmanna siam nise tih a ni. Conclave tihlawhtling thei tur mi pawimawh hrang hrang sawm tur leh, programme kimchang chu Mizoram Tourism department nen uluk zawka ennawn a thutlukna siam nise tiin rel a ni bawk.

NITI Aayog member Dr. VK Paul leh Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar te chu nikum November ni 10 khan NITI Bhawan, New Delhi-ah Mizoram tourism hmasawnna'na NITI Aayog leh Mizoram sawrkar hmalak ho dan tur ngaihtuahin an inkawm a, an thurel zingah Mizoram Tourism Conclave buatsaih hi a tel. Tourism inkhawmpui hi kumin October thlaah neih tura ruahman niin, stakeholder tam zawk an tel theihna tur leh, Mizoramin a hlawkpui theih tur zawnga ruahmanna siam nise tih a ni a. Niti Ayog rawtna angin Tourism Conclave inbuatsaihna pakhatah ‘pre-conclave meeting’ neih hi rel niin, NITI Aayog leh Mizoram sawrkarin hma an la dun mek a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Pu Alexander V. Chongthu, Addl. Resident Commissioner, Mizoram House, New Delhi leh Pu H. Lalramenga, PS to Minister te’n Minister an tawiawm a; NITI Aayog atangin Dy. Director General bakah Dr. Priscilla C. Ngaihte, CG-II, Public Policy Specialist leh Pi Aashna Sharma te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL KVK-IN THLAI CHI SEM CHHUAK
content:
268/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 24th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan KVK Khawzawl training hall-ah thlai chi semna hun hman a ni a. He hun hi Dr. Malsawmkimi, Senior Scientist & Head chuan kaihruaiin, Chawngtlai leh Neihdawn khua atanga kuthnathawktu thlan bik, hma la zau tur mi 43-te hnenah thlai chi tha an lo hriat tawh te - Hmarchapui (Arka Harita, Arka Tejesvi), Bawkbawn (Arka Keshav) leh Bawrhsaiabe (Arka Nikita) chi leh a enkawlna tur Indian Institute of Horticultural Research (IIHR-NEH) Scheme hnuai atangin pek chhuah an ni.

Dr. Malsawmkimi chuan vawiina kuthnathawktu kalkhawmte hnenah thlan bik an nihna chhan sawifiahin, KVK Khawzawl chuan theihtawp chhuaha kan district kan lo intodelh a, district pawn lam atang pawha heng kan thawhrim rah an lo chhawr theihna tura heng thlaite hi a ching tur bik thlan chhuah an nih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Pi R. Vanlalduati, Subject Matter Specialist (Soil Sc.) chuan kalkhawmte hnenah an thlai chinte leitha an pek danah fimkhur tura chahin, leitha inbuk tawk lo pekin kan leilung a khawih pawi theih dan leh leitha pek dan dik lovin thlai leh leia a nghawng thalo te, leitha inbuk tawk pek a pawimawhzia leh biofertilizers hman tul tawh zia leh thlai tana an tangkaina hrang hrang kuthnathawktu kalkhawmte hrilh hriatna a nei nghal bawk.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT AGRICULTURE MARKETING COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
267/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 24th April, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 AM khan District Agriculture Marketing Committee (DAMC) Lawngtlai District chu Bawrhsap leh Chairman ni bawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga hovin DC Conference Hall- ah  an thukhawm.

Pu Donny Lalriatsanga kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi  a. Mizoram sawrkarin Bâna Kaih (Handholding Policy) a kalpui mekah Lawngtlai District chhunga Sawhthing, chingtuten harsatna leh buaina liam tham sawi tur awm lo a, hlawk leh man man zawka phase I leh phase II a an hralh thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. a.Tun dinhmun ah Sawhthing bikah Nodal Department - ten an vil tha a, kumin 'target' ai a sang tharchhuah leh hralh a ni tur chu lawmawm a tih thu a tarlang. Bawrhsap chuan kut hnathawktute hmasawnna turin officials kalkhawmte chu tha thlah lova tan la zel turin a chah nghal bawk a ni.

Pu Caleb Vanlalrinngama, ADAO, leh  DAMC Member Secretary aiawh chuan report pekna a nei a. Kuminah Sawhthing lei thawhkhatna chu  February ni 2 atanga tanin May ni 30 thleng Lawngtlai district-ah lei a nih tur thu a sawi a. Lawngtlai District-  ah tun dinhmuna Sawhthing thar chhuah hi 7200 quintals niin Sangau SCC atangin 4200 quintal hralh tawh a ni a, Lawngtlai SCC, Siachangkawn SCC leh Bungtlang SCC ah 3000 quintals la hralh tur a awm mek tih a tarlang a ni.

Vawiin Lawngtlai District Agricultural Marketing Committee (DAMC) thutkhawmah hian DAMC Member- te an telkim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai chuan lawm thu sawina neiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB DISTRICT FAI BUL TANNA: KOLASIB DC OFFICE THAWKTUTEN HNATLANGPUI AN NEI
content:
266/2026-2027

Kolasib, 24th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Kolasib DC Office-a thawktute chuan 'Kolasib District Fai Bul Tanna' atan Kolasib Bawrhsap Pisapui (DC Office) tihfai hnatlangpui an nei a. He faina hnatlangpui hawnna inkhawm tawi hi Additional Deputy Commissioner (ADC) Pi B. Malsawmtluangi chuan a kaihruai a ni.

He hunah hian Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thu sawiin, Kolasib chu Mizorama khaw fai ber nihna hauh tuma hma lak a nih thu leh, chu faina beihpui chu hmun dang atanga tan lovin anmahni ngeiin DC office atanga bul an tan thu a sawi a. Faina beihpui thlak hi thla thar May-ah chuan khawtlang huapa kalpui turin Village Council (VC) leh YMA te nen thawhho a ni dawn a, October thlaah chuan ngawrh taka hmalakna a kalpui a nih dawn thu a tarlang.

DC chuan faina chu nunpui a, kan thinlungah fai duhna rilru put a pawimawh zia sawiin, mahni office leh thawhna hmun theuhte vawng fai turin a chah .

Faina beihpui hnatlang hi SDO (Sadar) leh DUDO ni bawk Pu H. Lalramliana chuan a vailiam a. Hemi hnu hian DC Office-a thawktute hian nilengin DC Office chhung leh a vel tifaia hnatlangin hun an hmang nghal a ni.

title: DECLARATION OF PUBLIC HOLIDAY
content:
38/2026-2027

Siaha, 23rd April 2026 :In pursuance of the letter No. H.11011/28/2025-GAD dated 15th April, 2026 issued by the General Administration Department, Government of Mizoram, an as conveyed by the Secretary, State Election Commission, Mizoram vide No.B.12024/1/2025-SEC/VC/MADC/23 dated 16th April, 2026, the Government of Mizoram has declared 30th April, 2026 (Thursday) as a Public Holiday for all Government Servants including employees under Central/State public Undertakings, Educational Institutions and Banking Institutions within 6(six) Village Councils as given below.

1. 9- Meisavaih East

2. 15- Thosai

3. 22- College Vaih-II

4. 31- Na-aohtlah III

5. 61- Tipa V-III

6. 93- Khaikhy

title: SIAHA DISTRICT TIPA-AH RUALBANLOTE TAN IDENTITY CARD SIAM RUNPUI NEIH A NI
content:
265/2026-2027

Dated Siaha, the April 23rd, 2026 :Vawiin khan Primary Health Centre, Tipa-ah ‘rualbanlote tan Identity Card siam runpui’ (assessment camp) neih a ni a, Zoram Medical College & Hospital leh District Hospital, Siaha-a doctor leh thawktu dangte an kal. Specialist Medical Doctor kalte hi - ENT, Medicine, Ophthalmology, Orthopaedics/PMR, Paediatrics, Psychiatry niin Clinical Psychologist, Audiologist leh Optometrist an tel bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Siaha district chhung khaw hrang hrang aṭangin mi eng emaw zat an kal khawm a, uluk taka en niin rualbanlo certificate mi 180 (za sawmriat) pek chhuah an ni. Rualbanlote tán Aadhaar enrollment (new) leh siam ṭhat (correction) ngaite a thlawnin siamṭhat sak an ni bawk.

Rualbanlote hian sawrkar aṭanga hamṭhatna dawng turin UDID Card (Rualbanlo ID) an neih zel a ngai tawh a. UDID Card siam tur hian an awmna District Hospital emaw Aizawl emaw an pan a ngai ṭhin a. UDID Card siam kawnga an harsatna sut kian anih theih nan leh anmahni puala hamṭhatna sawrkarin a duante an dawn ve ngei theih nan he UDID Assessment Camp hi kalpui a ni.

Assessment camp-hi Mizoram sawrkar hnuaia Social Welfare Department leh Health & Family Welfare Department ṭangkawpin an buatsaih a ni a, Siaha district-ah chuan Social Welfare Department-a thawktute hmalaknain Health & Family Welfare Department, Mara Chanô Py (MCHP), BDO Tipa leh PHC Tipa ṭanghoin neih a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit District Sports Committee thukhawm
content:
264/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 23rd of April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mamit District Sports Committee chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, Chairman Mamit District Sports Committee leh District Bawrhsap ni bawk hovin DC Conference Hall-ah thutkhawm a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Mamit khawpui chhunga infiamna hmun kan neih Basketball Court, Futsal Ground leh Sadbhav Mandap Hall, Mangkhawngdai enkawl chungchang sawiho a ni a, a hmang turte tana dan zawm turte leh hman man chungchangte rel a ni.

Multipurpose Indoor Stadium, Mamit Field veng hawh leh hmang duhte tana hman man leh dan zawm turte duan fel a ni bawk.

Mamit District Hockey Association atanga Multipurpose Indoor Stadium hman dilna chu a hmunhma enin committee hian rem lutuk lo a ngaih a ni a, Hockey Association tan hian hmun remchang dang dapa cheithat sak dan zawn nise tih a ni.
